channel.title: Perplexity Hub
channel.description: Perplexity Hub — synthesized feed by ai-news-spider

item.title: The Data Center Moves to Your Machine
item.description: Today we announced the next step for Personal Computer: the first hybrid local-server inference orchestrator.

item.title: Personal Computer is Coming to Windows
item.description: Computer for Windows acts on local files, orchestrates Microsoft apps, and works across the web.

item.title: Perplexity Computer for Growing Businesses
item.description: Today Perplexity is announcing the Main Street AI Accelerator, a $25 million Computer credits program, in collaboration with the Small Business Administration.
